title: 伝えられなかった言葉

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I got a letter! ♪ I got a letter! ♪ I got a letter
from my mom! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! The envelope smells a bit like milk too. I
wonder if the farm next door have new calves
again.

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: I saw that one special on TV! You were featured in Umamusume to Watch, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
I was so proud of the way you won that
scrimmage! You're the best granddaughter
anyone could ask for.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... You're giving me too much credit,
Gramps. I just got lucky that my strategy—yes, I
know, I know.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oops! I didn't know you were on the phone. I hope I
wasn't being too loud just now.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nah, you were fine. My call just ended anyway.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now don't hold back and lemme hear about how
much your folks back home love you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ You know, it was also heartwarming to
see you showered with so much love during your
phone call just now.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Aw, please. Compared to Spe? I'm nowhere near
as pure and earnest as her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm not exactly pure and earnest either! It's
just...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Letters just make me more forthcoming with my
feelings!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's been like that since I was little. Like, if I got in
a fight with my mom, or I wanted to express my
thanks for her on Mother's Day, I always found it
easy to write my feelings in a letter.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Also...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My mom always ends her letters to me with, "Spe,
my dear. I wish you a life of happiness, forever
and always."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I read that, it fills my heart with warm
and fuzzy feelings!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Warm and fuzzy feelings, huh? Hehe. You're
always so earnest, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: More forthcoming with your feelings, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, do you wanna try writing a letter too, Sei? If
you do, I can—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Me? Write a letter? No waaay. ★ That'd be so
out of character for me! Can you imagine how sad
my fans would be? Anyway, I gotta peace!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Sei?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I guess people these days prefer phone calls and
texting...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I don't think that's the reason. It's more likely that
Sei finds it hard to write a letter because she's so
easily embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I see... In that case...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this one's cute too! ♪ Hehe. It's so hard to
decide which one to choose.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to find a pretty envelope that would
make everyone happy!
choice_data_list: An envelope that makes everyone happy?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I'm actually in the middle of planning out an
important operation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems really excited about this operation of
hers. I can only hope it'll wind up being successful.
